projects.title: Dream Property
projects.description: A data-mapping project that fuses Ordnance Survey, Land Registry, Companies House, planning data and OpenStreetMap into a single map — scoring and filtering 1,800+ rural holdings across Cheshire. Built to answer one question: how do you find your dream place?

projects.title: Unload
projects.description: A task management app built for how human brains actually work. Auto-scheduling, Brain Mode, and an AI-powered brain dump that turns your thoughts into an organised day.

projects.title: Tomorrowland
projects.description: A book on future-proofing healthcare brands — combining scenario planning, behavioural science, and workshop methodology. Currently 72% written.

projects.title: AI-Powered Brief Builder
projects.description: A tool that helps strategists build better creative briefs using AI — trained on behavioural science principles and real-world brand strategy frameworks.

projects.title: Beautiful Thinking Blog
projects.description: 50+ articles exploring the intersection of brand strategy, behavioural science, and how people actually think. Originally on LinkedIn, now finding a proper home.

projects.title: Healthcare Comms AI Toolkit
projects.description: Experimenting with AI agents that can support the messy, creative, strategic work of healthcare communications — not just the operational bits.

projects.title: harrysharman.com
projects.description: This site. Built as a static site with markdown blog posts, maintained by OpenClaw. A side project about having a proper home on the internet.

caseStudies.description: Led the strategic repositioning of a top-20 pharma brand, shifting from a clinical efficacy story to one rooted in patient lived experience and behavioural insight.

cv.description: Building AI-powered software within a healthcare communications platform. Bridging brand strategy, behavioural science, and technology.
Led brand strategy for healthcare and pharmaceutical clients. Integrated behavioural science frameworks into strategic planning.
Developed brand positioning, campaign strategy, and audience insight for a range of healthcare brands.
